title: Building a Shopify Alternative With Crypto Payments: What Actually Works When You Are in a Restricted Country
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip do not work in your country. That is a platform problem, not a you problem. Here is what actually works.

content.text: As a digital creator in Nigeria, you're likely no stranger to the frustration of having a great product, but no way to collect payment because PayPal and Stripe are not available in your country. This is a common problem for creators in restricted countries, where traditional payment platforms are often unavailable due to geographic restrictions or banking limitations. The real solution lies in crypto-native infrastructure, which can provide a reliable and secure way to receive payments. With the right tools, you can start selling your digital products and getting paid, no matter where you are in the world. Unchained Commerce offers a range of products, including the Core Shop Engine, to help you get started.
What You Are Actually Comparing

When you're considering building a Shopify alternative with crypto payments, you're not just comparing payment platforms - you're comparing entire ecosystems. Traditional platforms like PayPal and Stripe have complex networks of banks, payment processors, and regulatory compliance, which can be slow, expensive, and unreliable, especially in restricted countries. Crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, offers a decentralized, global, and fully automated alternative, with no need for traditional banking or payment processing. This fundamental difference in architecture has a huge impact on what actually works when you're in a restricted country.
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional payment platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often break down for creators in restricted countries due to compliance decisions, fraud risk tiers, and banking infrastructure limitations. These platforms typically require users to have a bank account, verify their identity, and comply with local regulations, which can be difficult or impossible for creators in certain countries. As a result, many creators are left without a reliable way to receive payments, which can be devastating for their businesses. In contrast, crypto-native infrastructure can provide a more inclusive and accessible solution, with no need for traditional banking or identity verification.
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native infrastructure, like Unchained Commerce, does things differently by focusing on decentralization, automation, and global accessibility. With crypto payments, you don't need a bank account, and you don't need to verify your identity or comply with local regulations. This makes it much easier for creators in restricted countries to receive payments and sell their digital products. Additionally, crypto-native infrastructure often includes features like automated delivery, payment verification, and real-time analytics, which can help creators streamline their businesses and improve their customer experience. By using crypto-native infrastructure, creators can tap into a global market and connect with customers all over the world.
PayPal not being available in your country is not a you problem — it is a platform design decision that you are not obligated to accept.
The Real Cost Difference

One of the biggest advantages of crypto-native infrastructure is the cost difference. Traditional payment platforms often charge high fees, especially for cross-border transactions, which can eat into your profits. Crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, typically charges much lower fees, or even no fees at all, depending on the specific platform and payment method. This can make a huge difference for creators who are just starting out or who have limited budgets. With Unchained Commerce, for example, you can get started with the Core Shop Engine for just $49.99, and start receiving payments right away. This can be a game-changer for creators who are looking for a cost-effective and reliable way to sell their digital products.
Which One to Use and Why

So, which one should you use - traditional payment platforms or crypto-native infrastructure? The answer depends on your specific needs and circumstances. If you're a creator in a restricted country, crypto-native infrastructure is likely your best bet. With its decentralized, global, and fully automated architecture, it can provide a reliable and secure way to receive payments, no matter where you are in the world. Unchained Commerce offers a range of products, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, which can help you get started and succeed in the creator economy. By choosing crypto-native infrastructure, you can tap into a global market, connect with customers all over the world, and start building a successful and sustainable business.
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

Creators in restricted countries can get paid for digital products without PayPal by using crypto-native infrastructure, such as Unchained Commerce. This allows them to receive payments in cryptocurrency, which can then be converted to local currency or used to purchase other goods and services. With crypto-native infrastructure, creators can tap into a global market and connect with customers all over the world, without being limited by traditional payment platforms or banking infrastructure. By using crypto payments, creators can take control of their finances and start building a successful and sustainable business, no matter where they are in the world.
A platform that can decide your country does not qualify is a platform you are renting from on their terms, not infrastructure you own.
Related Topics Worth Reading

Crypto payments are revolutionizing the creator economy in developing countries, where traditional payment platforms are often unavailable or unreliable. By providing a decentralized, global, and fully automated way to receive payments, crypto-native infrastructure is helping creators tap into a global market and connect with customers all over the world. This is having a huge impact on the creator economy, enabling creators to build successful and sustainable businesses, and contributing to economic growth and development in their communities.
Your Launch Checklist — No Platform Permission Required

Before promoting your store to an audience, work through these confirmations in order. The Core Shop Engine backend is running and connected to your NOWPayments account with at least five coins active and verified on mainnet — not sandbox. The Web3 Wallet Connect is generating correct QR codes for each enabled coin and the amounts match what NOWPayments expects. At least one complete end-to-end test transaction has been run on mainnet where real crypto moved, the payment confirmed, and the product arrived in the test inbox without any manual step. The Admin Dashboard is showing the test order with correct payment status, delivery status, and timestamp at each stage. The receipt email contains the transaction ID, the payment amount in both USD and the crypto coin used, and the product delivery confirmation. None of these confirmations can be skipped — each one catches a different class of failure before a real buyer encounters it.
Your first sale through crypto will feel different from your first sale through a platform workaround — it will feel like it actually belongs to you.
Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
